fields.name: Mav Hills
fields.tastingNotes: milk chocolate, roasted nuts, citrus zest, caramel, smooth body

extras.bagDescription: Cafe-table burgundy pouch with a long dense front label, bilingual copy, and a handwritten-style roast sticker.

notes: The front roast-date sticker shows 18/05/24 while the back panel drifts to 12/05/24. Metadata follows the front sticker as the primary consumer-facing date.
